title: Nerf's Fancy Cursor
description: Fancy golden cursors made for the Minecraft Cursor mod.
body:
![A preview of the cursors added by the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4a1e179a9c1771cead9c468070b63257fe9e94c.png)

This is a resource pack for the [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/project/o5fhgLeQ) mod by fishstiz, providing stylized cursors perfect for medieval, RPG, or any other theme in a modpack!

Depending on what version of the mod you are using, you may need to install a different pack.
(1.21.9 broke Minecraft Cursor, so it has been remade as Cursors Extended)

Very vaguely inspired by the Bedrock-Style Cursors pack.
